title: Urban Food Security

prerequisites.text: Acceptance for Honours or Master's specialising in EGS or cognate disciplines.

outline: Topics include an overview of poverty and urbanization in Southern Africa; urban food security, methods and issues; urban poverty and vulnerability debates; food security and health; managing urban food systems (ecological, regulatory and fiscal dynamics). At NQF 9 level, students are expected to conduct a small piece of independent fieldwork informing an extended essay that critically engages a current debate on food security or food systems studies using a real-world case study.
dp_requirements: At least 80% attendance record and submission of all assignments.
